worlds.title: One sauce, five chapters
worlds.body: Each world is a different entrance to the same ritual.

items.title: The Origin
items.body: The myth, the chiles, the family notebook.

items.title: The Recipe Book
items.body: Twenty signed recipes featuring the sauce.

items.title: Select Tables
items.body: Restaurants and boutiques that hold it.

citation.quote: A sauce that doesn't ask permission. It arrives, sits down, transforms.
citation.author: — Editorial notebook

recipeTeaser.title: Three recipes to begin the ritual
recipeTeaser.body: Twenty signed dishes use AMBROSIA as the lead ingredient. These three are the entrance.

community.title: Mesa AMBROSIA
community.body: Early access to every batch, chef-signed recipes and reserved conversations. No algorithm. Only when there's something to say.

mito.title: The elixir of the gods
mito.body: In ancient mythology, AMBROSIA was the food that granted immortality to the Olympian gods. Today it is a sauce: small, decisive, made to honor the table. A single drop is enough to transform a dish.

origen.title: From an ancient myth to a contemporary table
origen.body: The word AMBROSIA spans centuries. To the Greeks it was the food that granted immortality; to us, the name of a family recipe that travelled three generations before being bottled. Each batch is made small: slow cooking, whole spices, prolonged rest.

ritual.title: A single drop transforms a dish.
ritual.body: The gods ate AMBROSIA; men learned to bottle it. Offered by hand. Received at the table.

interlude.quote: The gods ate AMBROSIA; men learned to bottle it.

closing.text: Offered by hand. Received at the table.

notes.name: Ancho chile
notes.note: Sweet, deep body. The base of the entire symphony.

notes.name: Morita chile
notes.note: Slow smoke, dry-cured. The memory of fire.

notes.name: Roasted tomato
notes.note: Tempered acidity and an enveloping sweetness.

notes.name: Confit garlic
notes.note: Cooked slowly until it turns to butter.

notes.name: Cumin
notes.note: Warm earth. The spice that ties it all.

notes.name: Aged vinegar
notes.note: A clean edge, a final shine.

notes.name: Sea salt
notes.note: Pure crystal. The line that defines the silhouette.

notes.name: Rest
notes.note: The last ingredient: time, darkness, patience.

items.nota: A drop tempers the fat, intensifies the smoke.
The simplest act, transformed into an offering.
A clean edge over white flesh and mineral crust.
Brings out the deep sweetness of slow cooking.

donde.title: Where to find it
donde.body: Available on chosen tables — by private inquiry.

compra.title: Where to buy it
compra.body: Available to the public at two select spaces in Monterrey. For corporate or private distribution, write to our concierge.

puntos.desc: Chef Manuel Orozco's author table, built on 20+ years of research into Northeastern Mexican cuisine.
Boutique butcher shop with over 40 years of tradition. Direct retail and home delivery service.

origen.title: The elixir that survived time
origen.body: From Olympus to Tenochtitlan, the word AMBROSIA crossed centuries before being bottled. Every drop we serve today is the inheritance of a myth that learned to become cooking.

la-salsa.title: One formula. A thousand rituals.
la-salsa.body: Eight notes. Five pairings. Two hundred milliliters that perform when it matters. This is the sauce: how it's made, how it tastes, where to find it.

recetario.title: Twenty ways to transform the day
recetario.body: Twenty signed recipes that use AMBROSIA as the lead ingredient. From simple breakfasts to long-table pieces, each dish is an invitation to the ritual.

mesas.title: Where the sauce becomes myth
mesas.body: Restaurants that understand what we serve. Boutiques that hold it as a piece. A select distribution — by private inquiry — that respects each batch's scale.

concierge.title: Conversations that deserve a bottle
concierge.body: For press, select distribution and corporate gifting. Three paths, one single attention. We reply in 48 hours and only when the conversation is worthwhile.

items.text: Greek gods eat AMBROSIA: the food of immortality.
Mexica sauces are offered as a ceremonial act on the table.
The formula is recorded in a family notebook; three generations guard it.
AMBROSIA is bottled under its own name for the first time.

conciergeIntent.title: What brings you to the table?

items.label: HORECA distribution
items.body: For restaurants, hotels and author bars that wish to add AMBROSIA to their menu.

items.label: Press & editorial
items.body: Sample requests, fact sheets, interviews and photoshoots.

items.label: Corporate gifting
items.body: Signed boxes, dedications and special packaging for clients and teams.

historia.title: Story
historia.body: AMBROSIA was born where mythology meets the kitchen. The original formula was recorded in a family recipe book in central Mexico in 1962; in 1998 the chile balance was adjusted and prolonged rest was added; in 2024 it was bottled for the first time under the Salsa AMBROSIA mark.

producto.title: One formula. A thousand rituals.
producto.body: AMBROSIA is born from a closed recipe: hand-selected chiles, spices from the Mediterranean and central Mexico, and a resting time that settles every note. The cobalt-blue bottle preserves color and flavor; the red wax seals the ritual. 200 ml · Mexico · 2024.

coleccion.title: 1,200 bottles. 90 days of rest.
coleccion.body: Each batch is made small. We don't chase yield — we chase a result that is worth the ritual. Distribution is by select channel and private inquiry — write to us if you'd like to taste it.

horeca.title: For chosen tables
horeca.body: We serve restaurants that understand an author's sauce deserves its own menu line: Pujol, Quintonil, Alcalde, Lardo, Casa Oaxaca, Rosetta, Sud 777, Le Chique. Concierge service, staff training, discreet co-branding.

diario.title: Journal
diario.body: Kitchen notes, launches, chef-signed recipes and conversations with those who have tasted what we serve. An editorial notebook, no algorithm, published only when there is something to say.

contacto.title: Contact
contacto.body: For press, select distribution and corporate gifting. We reply in 48 hours and only when the conversation is worthwhile. Vague questions deserve vague answers; precise ones deserve a bottle.

footer.tagline: Offered by hand. Received at the table.

newsletter.title: Receive our batches before anyone else
newsletter.body: AMBROSIA editions are limited. Subscribe and receive early access, chef-signed recipes, and news on the next bottling.
